products.title: 2 Rolls PLA HS, High Speed Filament, 1.75mm Dimensional Accuracy +/- 0.03 mm,Black&Grey
products.body_html:
Rapid PLA：3D Hojor Rapid PLA filament has good balance of melting and cooling, it can flow smoothly in the molten state and cool quickly when printing and forming. Printing efficiency can be increased by 300% with high speed 3D printer. True high speed printing and fast cooling. 

High Compatibility：Rapid PLA filament is better compatible with High Speeding 3D Printer, printing speed up to 350mm/s. Compatible with Bambu Lab X1 and X1C/Creality K1 and K1 MAX/AnkerMake M5/Voron 2.4 /Flsun V400/Creality Ender 7 and K1 K1 MAX/ Raise 3D Pro 3 and RMF500. 

High Speed Printing & Fast Cooling：Excellent Fluidity and controlled viscosity factor avoid excessive stringing and sagging. Under same model and printing time, High Speed 3D Printer with Rapid PLA can print 3-5 times faster at high speed of 300mm/s than Normal Speed 3D Printer with Ordinary PLA at low speed of 50mm/s.

Stable Dimensional Tolerance: Rapid PLA has high fluidity and low specific heat capacity, allows for rapid heat absorption and rapid melting, easy to cool after extrusion. It can maintain the printing quality and retain the integrity of the fine structure while High-speed printing.

High Precision & Smooth Extrusion：Compared with ordinary PLA filament, PLA-HS has better printing effect, higher precision, good layer bonding, no deformation, less brittle and not easy to break. Melt well, feed smoothly and constantly without clogging the nozzle or extruder, high printing successful rate.

products.title: 2 Rolls - Matte PLA Filament 1.75mm Dimensional Accuracy +/- 0.03mm for FDM 3D Printers
products.body_html:
High Quality Matte Finish: 3D Hojor Matte PLA Filament 1.75mm,matte finish which helps hide the layers of your print,bed adhesion and extrusion output has been significantly improved. Matte PLA filament can be used to make prints with shine-free and frosted texture.


High Toughness & Better Adhesion: Compared to normal PLA filament, 3D Hojor Matte PLA has higher toughness ,better adhesion and printibility.Printed models are not easy to break or crack, which can be widly used in accessory, home decoration, toy, sculpture, shell and COSPLAY.


Odorless & No Bubble: Matte PLA filaments deliver excellent printing quality with no odor and low warpage during printing; Complete drying for 24 hours before vacuum packaging to effectively protect the filament from moisture, no stringing and bubble-free. Not easy to break. Supporting structure of it is easy to peel off.


Dimensional Accuracy & Consistency:  Dimensional Tolerance +/- 0.03mm. Minimum tolerance and low warping to ensure consistent feeding and stable prints, no bubbles, less stringing, extremely high successful rate.

variants.title: USA / Matte Mint Green Lake Blue / 2*1KG

products.title: 2 Rolls PLA-Lite Filament 1.75mm for Most FDM 3D Printers
products.body_html:
3D Hojor PLA 3D Printer Filament: 3D Hojor PLA Lite, as a cost-effective filament, keeps all the advantages of PLA: easy to print, excellent layer bonding, low shrinkage, no cracking, high toughness and not easy to break, which is an ideal choice for both entry-level 3D printing amateurs and professionals.

 
Stable Dimensional Tolerance: 3D Hojor PLA Lite is designed with minimum tolerance and low warping to ensure consistent feeding and stable prints. It enables printed model to be more durable, less stringing, no bubbles, no deformation and easy handling, which can offer you an outstanding surface finish and a high precision. 

 
High Compatibility: 3D Hojor PLA Lite is compatible with Most of FDM 3D Printers, such as: Raise3D, Prusa, Voron, Creality 3D, Bambu Lab, etc. And it is widly used in accessory, art & craft, home decoration, toy, sculpture, shell and COSPLAY. We recommend extrusion / nozzle temperature at 190-230℃, bed Temperature at 45-60℃.

 
Tangle Free & No Plugging: 3D Hojor PLA Lite, as full 1KG 3D printer filament reel, has perfect roundness, tight diameter tolerance and good winding, thus it does not overlap or tangle. And it melts well, feeds smoothly and constantly without clogging the nozzle or extruder to ensure a high printing successful rate. 

  
Environmentally Friendly Packaging: 3D Hojor PLA Lite is designed with cardboard spool packaging, which is lightweight and recyclable to better protect the environment. And 3D Hojor filament comes in a sealed vacuum bag with a desiccant bag, easily keep your 3D printer filaments at an optimal storage condition and free from dust or dirt.

variants.title: USA / PLA Lite Black Cold White / 2*1KG

products.title: 2 Rolls PLA+ PLA Pro Filament 1.75mm, Enhanced Toughness for 3D Printer
products.body_html:
Enhanced Toughness PLA+: PLA+ is an enhanced version of ordinary PLA. It has higher strength and better toughness, not easy to break. Made with starch raw materials derived from renewable plant resources, eco-friendly and non-toxic, no harm to to human and the environment.


High Speed Printing: PLA+ meets the demands for high-speed printers and keeps outstanding performance at high speeds. And it also keeps all the advantages of PLA, easy to print, low shrinkage, no deformation, no cracking, high printing precision. Good layer bonding performance meets your demands for printing functional parts with higher toughness.


Dimensional Tolerance +/- 0.03mm: eSUN PLA+ 3D printer filaments are produced with more precise specification. Minimum tolerance and low warping to ensure consistent feeding and stable prints, no bubbles, less stringing, extremely high printing successful rate.

 
Tangle Free & No Plugging: Total Length: 340-350m. Full 1KG 3D printer filament reel, perfect roundness and very tight diameter tolerance, good winding, does not overlap or tangle. Melt well, feed smoothly and constantly without clogging the nozzle or extruder.

 
High Compatibility: Compatible with Most of FDM 3D Printers, such as: Bambu Lab X1/X1C, Creality K1 /K1 MAX , AnkerMake M5, Prusa, MakerBot, UltiMaker, MK3, Ender 3, Flashforge, Raise3D, FLSUN V400, Voron 2.4. Widly used in machinery, electronic appliances, automobiles, decorations and COSPLAY.

variants.title: USA / PLA Pro Black Cold white / 2*1KG
